Flow.description: Screenflow to allow the Project Summary Actuals t be displayed on the Grant Recipient Portal
Flow.label: DESNZ Project Summary Display

fields.name: Project_Detail_Summary
fields.fieldText: Project Actuals

fields.name: No_of_Homes_Suitable_For_Retrofit_SHF
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Suitable For Retrofit

fields.name: No_of_Homes_Ready_For_Installs_To_Start_SHF
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Ready For Installs To Start

fields.name: No_of_Homes_All_Installations_Completed_SHF
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes All Installations Completed

fields.name: No_of_Homes_To_EPC_C_SHF
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes To EPC C

fields.name: No_of_Homes_Treated_With_At_Least_One_Measure_LG
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Treated With At Least One Measure

fields.name: No_of_Homes_To_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes To EPC C

textTemplates.name: txtActualHomesToEpcC
textTemplates.text: Actual Homes To Epc C
